title: Trandoshan Elites
content:
{{Top|leg}} [[File:THM.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A Trandoshan elite.]] {{Quote|What in death's name is that?!"
"Must've been some heavy assault mercenaries. Trandoshan Elites. I heard they carry a LS-150 Heavy ACP Repeater.''"
"''You heard right. Nasty weapon.|[[RC-1140/Legends|Fixer]] and [[Boss (clone commando)/Legends|Boss]]|''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''}} '''Trandoshan Elites''' were a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group that worked closely with Trandoshan [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]]. In battle, Trandoshan Elites typically carried [[LS-150 Heavy Accelerated Charged Particle Repeater Gun]]s, with a bayonet, which could pierce even [[Clone trooper armor/Legends|clone trooper armor]]. They also wore a set of extremely durable [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. The clone commando unit [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] encountered several of them on various missions such as the ''[[Prosecutor]]'' infiltration. They also participated in the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] attempt to take [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]] and claim [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Republic Commando: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Republic Commando'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Trandoshanische Elitetruppe |uk=Трандошанська еліта }} [[Category:Separatist military units]] [[Category:Soldiers]] [[Category:Trandoshan organizations]]
